entities.description: mqtt is a technology used for communication between the public mqtt hivemq server and the upper computer ubuntu web program
hivemq is an organization that provides a public mqtt server for communication
ubuntu is a product that refers to the upper computer s operating system used in the communication setup
web is a software component of the upper computer used for communication
eth0 rgmi is a gigabit ethernet port on the evaluation board used for network connectivity

relations.description: mqtt is the technology used by the hivemq server for communication
mqtt is the technology used for communication with the ubuntu web program
mqtt is the technology used for communication with the web software component
has a gigabit ethernet port eth0 rgmi for network connectivity
is connected to the upper computer for network communication
the upper computer communicates with the mqtt server for data exchange
